core_philosophy: A high-end, premium SaaS dashboard styled like a 'Control Room' for AI website analysis. Black-on-black layers, neon accents strictly used to indicate action or data, and an immersive, technical yet luxurious feel. Emphasizes modern micro-interactions, glowing borders, and progressive disclosure.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none text-white
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white

surfaces_and_micro_themes.cards: bg-[#0F0F1A] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-[#00E5FF]/30 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,229,255,0.15)]

buttons.analyze_cta: animate-pulse hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-300 ease-out shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,229,255,0.6)]

motion_and_interactions.progressive_loading: opacity-0 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-4 duration-700 stagger-100
motion_and_interactions.counters: Use react-countup or framer-motion for the 'Money Lost' block to smoothly roll numbers from 0 to target value.

components_instructions.hero_section: Use a deep void background with the 'Abstract neon lines' image at 30% opacity. Center the H1. Below H1, place a glowing massive URL input field with the 'Analizar Web' (Analyze web) CTA. The CTA must use the analyze_button gradient and a drop-shadow glow.
components_instructions.dashboard_results: Render inside a 'Control Room' bento grid. Make sure the cards use 'bg-[#0F0F1A] border-white/5'. Hovering on a card should give it a slight neon glow border. The 'Money Lost' block should be visually distinct (col-span-2) with a massive red/neon text counter.
components_instructions.visual_score: Render as a circular SVG progress bar or large bold number. Score < 50: #FF3B30. Score 50-79: #FFCC00. Score 80+: #39FF14. Add inner drop shadow to give it a techy neon feel.
components_instructions.floating_cta: Fixed positioned button at bottom-right 'Probar ahora' (Try now). Use glassmorphism background with neon green text and border.
components_instructions.email_popup: Shadcn Dialog component. Heavy glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-2xl bg-black/80). Electric blue accents.
components_instructions.language_toggle: A simple toggle in the header (ES / EN). The primary UI must be in Spanish (es).
components_instructions.inputs: Shadcn Input, customized to bg-[#0A0A12] with text-white and border-white/20. Focus state: border-[#00E5FF] ring-1 ring-[#00E5FF].
components_instructions.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone weight) or lucide-react. Must be sized appropriately and colored using brand colors.

hero_background.description: Abstract neon lines forming a digital landscape. Use as background for the hero section with low opacity (10-20%)

dashboard_texture.description: Abstract fluid sculpture with purple and blue lighting. Can be used in premium unlock banner or result cards as a subtle background.

data_testid_rules: All interactive elements, forms, and results MUST include data-testid. Examples: data-testid='url-input', data-testid='analyze-btn', data-testid='money-lost-counter', data-testid='visual-score'.
instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'framer-motion' for all fade-in, progressive loading, and scale hover animations.
Install and use 'react-countup' or framer-motion equivalent for the 'Money Lost' animated counter.
Do NOT use 'Inter', use 'Cabinet Grotesk' for Headings and 'Manrope' for body text. Use generic sans-serif fallbacks if these fonts fail to load.
The UI text MUST be entirely in Spanish ('Analizar Web', 'Oportunidades', 'Dinero Perdido', 'Desbloquear Reporte Premium').
Ensure 'Money Lost' card is intensely visual—use red text (#FF3B30) glowing softly, to indicate urgency.
Stripe payments and Google Auth UI sections should look natively integrated with the Dark Neon theme, overriding default bright buttons where possible.
Ensure high contrast: white or very light gray text on the deep dark backgrounds.
Use standard tailwind gradients and custom utility classes from index.css for glow effects.
